summary: A solid US‑Festival performance from a strong touring era captured on an audience FOB recording that sounds thin and echoey.
review: The show is praised as a decent, high‑energy set from one of the Dead’s peak touring years, with reviewers calling it “fantastic” and noting the historic festival atmosphere. The front‑of‑house/audience recording is usable but suffers from thin bass, vocal echo and a lack of punch compared to smaller venue recordings.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviewers give high marks (two 5‑star, one 4‑star); the musical performance is viewed positively while the recording quality is noted as only fair, leading to a weighted rating around 4.1.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Thin bass, vocal echo, and reduced punch likely due to large stadium acoustics; overall comparable to many audience recordings but not as clear as typical front‑of‑house pulls.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a decent set from a strong touring period; reviewers note the historic festival context but give no specific song commentary.
